## GhostRun 2.0.0-alpha.5

Patch release — CI reliability and dependency hygiene.

### Fixed
- E2E Hacker News tests skip gracefully when datacenter IPs return `Sorry.` (GitHub Actions)
- **0 npm audit vulnerabilities** — removed unused `electron` devDependency, applied dependency updates

```bash
npm install -g ghostrun-cli@2.0.0-alpha.5
```
